content.description: The artifact content (technical design, analysis, research findings as markdown)

subtasks.description: List of subtasks to create (empty array with skip_reason to skip breakdown)

description.description: Brief summary of what this subtask accomplishes (1-2 sentences)

detailed_instructions.description: Detailed implementation instructions for this specific subtask (becomes the subtask's primary artifact)

depends_on.description: Indices of subtasks this depends on (0-based)

skip_reason.description: Required justification when subtasks array is empty (skipping breakdown)

activity_log.description: Short narrative summary of what you did during this stage. Describe what was implemented, what was skipped and why, and any key decisions made.
